---
title: "About Jiashen Liu"
image: assets/avatar.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/michaelgentsJason
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:Jiashen.Liu@warwick.ac.uk

---

I am **Jiashen Liu / 刘家燊**, currently studying at the **University of Warwick** (Cyber Security Engineering, MSc with Distinction).
I graduated from **Nanjing Agricultural University** with a major in Information Management and Information Systems, where my graduation thesis **DIAKG-GPT** won the university-level excellent graduation thesis award.

## Research Interests

My research focuses on **Multimodal AI** and **Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning Systems**, with a key interest in Vision-Language-Structured Knowledge Fusion, Tool-Augmented Reasoning, and Multi-Step Decision Making for Complex Tasks.
Recently, my research covers Web Security Automation, Document Retrieval & Understanding, and Multimodal Evaluation Benchmark Construction.

## Contact

Contact: [Jiashen.Liu@warwick.ac.uk](mailto:Jiashen.Liu@warwick.ac.uk)
